scripts.build: pnpm --filter @feishu-timeline/shared build && pnpm --filter @feishu-timeline/web build && pnpm --filter @feishu-timeline/api build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @feishu-timeline/shared lint && pnpm --filter @feishu-timeline/web lint && pnpm --filter @feishu-timeline/api lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @feishu-timeline/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @feishu-timeline/web typecheck && pnpm --filter @feishu-timeline/api typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @feishu-timeline/shared test && pnpm --filter @feishu-timeline/web test && pnpm --filter @feishu-timeline/api test
